verdict: Reframed the Jolt set around amplification instead of mini-LinkedIn educational content. The package now emphasizes sharp observations, recognition lines, tactical utility, and one optional author engagement angle.
strengths: Better separation between LinkedIn depth and X amplification
Includes timing and cross-channel role hints
Preserves the stronger voice work from the gold set
problems: Still needs human taste-check for which posts feel strongest live
Author engagement copy may want real @handles later when posting
required_fixes: Review which posts Chad would actually publish first
Add real author tags at posting time if used
